title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Kuehne+Nagel India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Kuehne+Nagel India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Kuehne+Nagel India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Distribution Manager at our Mumbai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Kuehne+Nagel India:
Kuehne+Nagel India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kuehne+Nagel India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
